ul.li: Memory Alignment: Buffer must be aligned to getpagesize() (typically 4KB) for mprotect calls.
Growth Policy: If used + n > capacity, perform mremap or re-allocate new buffer + memcpy.

Instruction Emitter:
Check bounds: if (used + sz > capacity) grow();
Write opcode to *cursor.
Increment cursor by instr_size.
Increment used by instr_size.
